title.zh: 三大保健穴位：合谷、足三里、三阴交
title.en: Three Essential Health Acupoints: Hegu, Zusanli, Sanyinjiao

description.zh: 详解合谷、足三里、三阴交三大保健穴位的定位、功效和按摩方法，日常保健必备
description.en: Detailed guide to three essential health acupoints - location, benefits, and massage techniques for daily wellness

zh.text: 在中医养生中，有三个穴位被称为
，它们分别是合谷穴、足三里穴和三阴交穴。这三个穴位各有独特功效，是日常保健的必备知识。
合谷穴位于手背，第一、二掌骨之间，约在第二掌骨中点处。简便取穴方法：将拇指和食指并拢，肌肉隆起最高处即是。

items: 止痛：头痛、牙痛、咽喉痛
疏风解表：感冒、发热
调理气血：面部疾病、口眼歪斜
安神镇静：失眠、焦虑

zh.text: 用拇指指腹按压，力度以有酸胀感为宜，每次3-5分钟，每日2-3次。
⚠️ 注意：孕妇慎用合谷穴，以免影响胎儿。
足三里位于小腿外侧，犊鼻穴（膝盖外侧凹陷）下3寸，胫骨前缘外一横指处。简便取穴：屈膝，手掌按住膝盖，中指尖所指处外一横指即是。

items: 健脾和胃：消化不良、腹胀、腹泻
补中益气：体质虚弱、疲劳乏力
强身健体：增强免疫力，延年益寿
调理气血：贫血、营养不良

zh.text: 用拇指或中指按压，力度适中，每次5-10分钟，每日1-2次。也可艾灸，每次15-20分钟。
，说明足三里是强身健体的重要穴位。
三阴交位于小腿内侧，内踝尖上3寸，胫骨内侧缘后方。简便取穴：内踝尖上四横指宽，胫骨后缘处。

items: 调补肝肾：月经不调、痛经、更年期症状
健脾利湿：水肿、小便不利
安神助眠：失眠多梦
活血化瘀：妇科疾病

zh.text: 用拇指按压，力度以有酸胀感为宜，每次3-5分钟，每日1-2次。
⚠️ 注意：孕妇禁用三阴交穴，可能引起子宫收缩。

items: 每天早晚按摩这三个穴位各5分钟
按摩时保持放松，呼吸自然
持之以恒，效果更佳
配合健康饮食和作息，事半功倍

zh.text: 温馨提示：穴位按摩是日常保健方法，不能替代医疗治疗。如有疾病症状，请及时就医。

en.text: In TCM wellness, three acupoints are known as the 'Health Trio': Hegu, Zusanli, and Sanyinjiao. Each has unique benefits and is essential knowledge for daily health maintenance.

Hegu is located on the hand, between the first and second metacarpal bones, at the midpoint of the second metacarpal. Simple method: bring thumb and index finger together, the highest point of the muscle bulge is the point.

items: Pain relief: Headache, toothache, throat pain
Release wind and exterior: Cold, fever
Regulate Qi and Blood: Facial issues, deviation of mouth and eyes
Calm spirit: Insomnia, anxiety

en.text: Press with thumb pad, moderate pressure until soreness is felt, 3-5 minutes each time, 2-3 times daily.
⚠️ Note: Pregnant women should use Hegu cautiously to avoid affecting the fetus.

Zusanli is on the outer lower leg, 3 cun below Dubi (knee depression), one finger-width lateral to the tibia. Simple method: bend knee, place palm on knee, point where middle finger reaches, one finger-width outward.

items: Strengthen spleen and stomach: Indigestion, bloating, diarrhea
Tonify middle Qi: Weak constitution, fatigue
Strengthen body: Boost immunity, longevity
Regulate Qi and Blood: Anemia, malnutrition

en.text: Press with thumb or middle finger, moderate pressure, 5-10 minutes, 1-2 times daily. Can also use moxibustion, 15-20 minutes each time.
TCM saying: 'For peace and health, keep Zusanli moist' - showing its importance for strengthening the body.
Sanyinjiao is on the inner lower leg, 3 cun above the inner ankle tip, posterior to the tibia. Simple method: four finger-widths above inner ankle tip, behind the tibia.

items: Tonify liver and kidney: Irregular menstruation, dysmenorrhea, menopause symptoms
Strengthen spleen, resolve dampness: Edema, urinary issues
Calm spirit, aid sleep: Insomnia, dreams
Activate blood, resolve stasis: Gynecological conditions

en.text: Press with thumb, moderate pressure until soreness, 3-5 minutes, 1-2 times daily.
⚠️ Note: Pregnant women should NOT use Sanyinjiao - it may cause uterine contraction.

items: Massage these three points 5 minutes each, morning and evening
Stay relaxed during massage, breathe naturally
Consistency brings better results
Combine with healthy diet and routine for best effect

en.text: Note: Acupoint massage is for daily health maintenance and does not replace medical treatment. Seek medical care for disease symptoms.
